title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mahagun Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
